title: MS Teams Channel Config
description: Configuration for the Microsoft Teams channel adapter. Uses the Bot Framework Connector REST API with OAuth2 client-credentials grant. NOTE: This is a send-only MVP; inbound webhook receive is deferred to v0.8.3.

credential_handle_app_id.description: Credentials-store key for the Azure AD application (client) ID.

credential_handle_app_password.description: Credentials-store key for the Azure AD client secret (app password).

service_url.description: Bot Framework service URL for the tenant (e.g. https://smba.trafficmanager.net/amer/). Required for send; obtained from the first inbound activity.
